name: LogicMonitor
description: LogicMonitor is an enterprise infrastructure monitoring platform that provides unified visibility across cloud, on-premises, and hybrid environments with automated monitoring, alerting, and AIOps capabilities.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your LogicMonitor portal.
2. Go to Settings > Users and Roles.
3. Select your user or create a new API-only user.
4. Under the API Tokens tab, click Generate to create a new Bearer Token.
5. Copy the Bearer token value and enter it above.
6. Enter your LogicMonitor account name (the subdomain from your LogicMonitor URL).

credentialFields.label: Account Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your LogicMonitor account name (the subdomain in your LogicMonitor URL, e.g. 'mycompany' from mycompany.logicmonitor.com).

credentialFields.label: API Bearer Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate a Bearer token in LogicMonitor: Settings > Users and Roles > API Tokens. Copy the token value.

checks.name: LogicMonitor App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the LogicMonitor API is reachable and the Bearer token is valid by making a lightweight API call.

checks.name: LogicMonitor Device Monitoring
checks.description: Lists monitored devices and verifies they are actively monitored with healthy status.

checks.name: LogicMonitor Alert Management
checks.description: Checks for active critical and error alerts in LogicMonitor to assess current alert health.

checks.name: LogicMonitor Collector Health
checks.description: Verifies that LogicMonitor collectors are registered and running, ensuring continuous monitoring data collection.

checks.name: LogicMonitor Alert Rules
checks.description: Verifies that alert rules are configured in LogicMonitor to ensure proper alert routing and escalation.
